comments.text: GPT Pro improves the lower bound to 0.38055470, find the proof note and reproducible certificate package here.
The constant has now been optimised to 0.380856 by [YLTLYSTYLLGDHZSWZSHMELCZX26].

In my paper with Georgiev, Gomez-Serrano, and Wagner (see Problem 6.5), AlphaEvolve could improve the upper bound very slightly to 0.380924. (Not the most exciting improvement in the world, but I am reporting it for completeness.) (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
Haha, these slight improvements remind me of Moser's worm problem, Lebesgue's universal covering problem, and stuffs of this sort.
Section 4.1.1 of this paper of Yuksekgonul et al., using a new tool TTT-Discover, claims a further improvement of the upper bound to 0.380876. (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
This constant is now recorded as $C_{1b}$ in the optimization problems repository.
